metadata.description: KASH job profile catalog for career mapping

software_developer_001.title: Software Developer
software_developer_001.description: Design, develop, and maintain software applications and systems

metadata.education_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
metadata.growth_potential: High - can progress to senior developer, architect, or management roles

knowledge_competencies.name: algorithms_and_data_structures
knowledge_competencies.description: Understanding of fundamental algorithms and data structures

knowledge_competencies.name: software_development_lifecycle
knowledge_competencies.description: Knowledge of SDLC methodologies and practices

abilities_competencies.name: logical_reasoning
abilities_competencies.description: Ability to think logically and solve complex problems

abilities_competencies.name: continuous_learning
abilities_competencies.description: Ability to quickly learn new technologies and concepts

skills_competencies.name: programming_languages
skills_competencies.description: Proficiency in at least one programming language

habits_competencies.name: attention_to_detail
habits_competencies.description: Careful attention to code quality and details

habits_competencies.name: team_collaboration
habits_competencies.description: Ability to work effectively in a team environment

success_criteria: Delivers high-quality, maintainable code
Collaborates effectively with team members
Continuously learns and adapts to new technologies
Meets project deadlines and requirements
software_developer_001.rationale: Software developers are essential for building digital solutions that drive business innovation and user experiences in today's technology-driven world.
software_developer_001.career_path: Junior Developer → Mid-level Developer → Senior Developer → Tech Lead/Architect → Engineering Manager

data_scientist_002.title: Data Scientist
data_scientist_002.description: Analyze complex data to help organizations make better decisions

metadata.education_requirements: Master's degree in Data Science, Statistics, or related field
metadata.growth_potential: Very High - can progress to Senior Data Scientist, ML Engineer, or Data Science Manager

knowledge_competencies.name: statistics_and_probability
knowledge_competencies.description: Strong foundation in statistical methods and probability theory

knowledge_competencies.name: ml_algorithms
knowledge_competencies.description: Knowledge of various machine learning algorithms and techniques

abilities_competencies.name: data_analysis
abilities_competencies.description: Ability to analyze and interpret complex datasets

abilities_competencies.name: business_acumen
abilities_competencies.description: Understanding of business context and problem framing
success_signals: Translates business problems to data questions

skills_competencies.name: python_r_programming
skills_competencies.description: Proficiency in Python or R for data analysis

skills_competencies.name: data_visualization
skills_competencies.description: Ability to create effective data visualizations

habits_competencies.name: critical_thinking
habits_competencies.description: Critical approach to data analysis and interpretation

habits_competencies.name: technical_communication
habits_competencies.description: Ability to communicate technical concepts to non-technical audiences

success_criteria: Delivers actionable insights from data analysis
Builds accurate and reliable predictive models
Communicates findings effectively to stakeholders
Continuously improves analytical methodologies
data_scientist_002.rationale: Data scientists unlock valuable insights from data, helping organizations make informed decisions and gain competitive advantages in the data-driven economy.
data_scientist_002.career_path: Junior Data Scientist → Data Scientist → Senior Data Scientist → Principal Data Scientist → Data Science Manager/Head of Data

product_manager_003.title: Product Manager
product_manager_003.description: Lead product strategy and development to deliver value to customers

metadata.education_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Business, Engineering, or related field
metadata.growth_potential: High - can progress to Senior Product Manager, Director of Product, or VP of Product

knowledge_competencies.name: market_analysis
knowledge_competencies.description: Understanding of market dynamics and competitive analysis

knowledge_competencies.name: product_development
knowledge_competencies.description: Knowledge of product development methodologies and lifecycle

abilities_competencies.name: strategic_thinking
abilities_competencies.description: Ability to think strategically and plan long-term

abilities_competencies.name: stakeholder_management
abilities_competencies.description: Ability to manage relationships with various stakeholders

skills_competencies.name: data_analysis
skills_competencies.description: Ability to analyze product metrics and user data

skills_competencies.name: technical_understanding
skills_competencies.description: Understanding of technical concepts and limitations

habits_competencies.name: decision_making
habits_competencies.description: Ability to make informed decisions under uncertainty

habits_competencies.name: customer_empathy
habits_competencies.description: Deep understanding and empathy for customer needs

success_criteria: Delivers products that meet customer needs
Achieves business objectives and KPIs
Maintains strong stakeholder relationships
Continuously improves product processes
product_manager_003.rationale: Product managers bridge the gap between business needs and customer solutions, ensuring that products deliver value and drive business success.
product_manager_003.career_path: Associate Product Manager → Product Manager → Senior Product Manager → Principal Product Manager → Director/VP of Product

ux_designer_004.title: UX Designer
ux_designer_004.description: Design user-centered experiences for digital products and services

metadata.education_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Design, HCI, or related field
metadata.growth_potential: High - can progress to Senior UX Designer, UX Lead, or Design Director

knowledge_competencies.name: design_principles
knowledge_competencies.description: Understanding of fundamental design principles and theory

abilities_competencies.name: design_thinking
abilities_competencies.description: Ability to approach problems with design thinking methodology

abilities_competencies.name: user_empathy
abilities_competencies.description: Ability to understand and empathize with user needs and pain points

skills_competencies.name: design_software
skills_competencies.description: Proficiency with design tools (Figma, Sketch, Adobe Creative Suite)

skills_competencies.name: interactive_prototyping
skills_competencies.description: Ability to create interactive prototypes and wireframes

habits_competencies.name: cross_functional_collaboration
habits_competencies.description: Ability to work effectively with developers, product managers, and stakeholders

habits_competencies.name: design_iteration
habits_competencies.description: Habit of continuously iterating and improving designs based on feedback

success_criteria: Creates intuitive and user-friendly designs
Conducts effective user research and testing
Collaborates successfully with development teams
Delivers designs that meet business and user needs
ux_designer_004.rationale: UX designers ensure that digital products are usable, enjoyable, and valuable to users, directly impacting user satisfaction and business success.
ux_designer_004.career_path: Junior UX Designer → UX Designer → Senior UX Designer → UX Lead → Design Director/Head of Design

cybersecurity_analyst_005.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
cybersecurity_analyst_005.description: Protect organization's digital assets and infrastructure from security threats

metadata.education_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Cybersecurity, IT, or related field
metadata.growth_potential: Very High - can progress to Security Engineer, Security Architect, or CISO

knowledge_competencies.name: security_fundamentals
knowledge_competencies.description: Understanding of cybersecurity principles and best practices

knowledge_competencies.name: network_security
knowledge_competencies.description: Knowledge of network security concepts and protocols

abilities_competencies.name: threat_analysis
abilities_competencies.description: Ability to analyze and assess security threats and vulnerabilities

abilities_competencies.name: incident_response
abilities_competencies.description: Ability to respond effectively to security incidents

skills_competencies.name: security_software
skills_competencies.description: Proficiency with security tools and software

skills_competencies.name: scripting_automation
skills_competencies.description: Ability to write scripts for security automation

habits_competencies.name: security_vigilance
habits_competencies.description: Constant awareness and attention to security concerns

habits_competencies.name: continuous_security_learning
habits_competencies.description: Commitment to staying updated with security threats and trends

success_criteria: Maintains strong security posture for organization
Detects and responds to security threats effectively
Implements appropriate security controls and measures
Stays current with emerging security threats and technologies
cybersecurity_analyst_005.rationale: Cybersecurity analysts are critical for protecting organizations from increasingly sophisticated cyber threats and ensuring business continuity.
cybersecurity_analyst_005.career_path: Junior Security Analyst → Security Analyst → Senior Security Analyst → Security Engineer → Security Architect/CISO
